G

GameController - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.controller
Controller class orchestrating core game loop events, state timing, and keyboard interactions.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.GameController
 
GameEventAdapter - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners
No-op adapter for IGameEventListener.
GameEventAdapter() - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners.GameEventAdapter
 
GameException - Exception in com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions
Abstract root of all Cincuentazo custom exceptions.
GameException() - Constructor for exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.GameException
Constructs a GameException with no detail message.
GameException(String) - Constructor for exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.GameException
Constructs a GameException with the specified detail message.
GameException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.GameException
Constructs a GameException with a detail message and a cause.
GameRuleViolationException - Exception in com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions
Unchecked exception thrown when an internal game state becomes inconsistent or when game logic is invoked in a way that violates the engine's preconditions.
GameRuleViolationException(String) - Constructor for exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.GameRuleViolationException
Constructs a GameRuleViolationException with a detail message describing the violated invariant.
GameRuleViolationException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.GameRuleViolationException
Constructs a GameRuleViolationException with a detail message and an underlying cause.
GameState - Record Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.model
An immutable snapshot of the public game state visible to all players at the moment a machine player must make a decision.
GameState(int, int, int) - Constructor for record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.GameState
Creates an instance of a GameState record class.
GameView - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.view
Handles all UI rendering, layout coordination, and visual animations for the game screen.
GameView(Label, Label, Label, Label, Label, ImageView, ImageView, HBox, HBox, VBox, Label) - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.view.GameView
 
getActivePlayers() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TurnManager
 
getAvailablePileCards() - Method in exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.EmptyDeckException
Returns the number of cards that were in the table pile when this exception was thrown.
getCard() - Method in exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.InvalidPlayException
Returns the card that caused the violation.
getCurrentSum() - Method in exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.InvalidPlayException
Returns the table sum at the time the exception was thrown.
getCurrentSum() - Method in exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.NoPlayableCardException
Returns the table sum that blocked all possible plays.
getCurrentSum() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TablePile
Returns the current running sum of all cards played so far.
getHand() - Method in interface com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.IPlayer
Returns an unmodifiable view of the player's current hand.
getHand() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.PlayerAdapter
Returns an unmodifiable view of the player's current hand.
getHuman() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TurnManager
 
getInstance() - Static method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.view.SceneManager
Retrieves the singleton instance of the SceneManager.
getName() - Method in interface com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.IPlayer
Returns the player's display name.
getName() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.PlayerAdapter
Returns the player's display name.
getPlayableIndices(int) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.HumanPlayer
Returns the indices of all cards in the human's hand that are legally playable given currentSum.
getPlayerName() - Method in exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.NoPlayableCardException
Returns the name of the player that cannot move.
getSuppliedCount() - Method in exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.InvalidPlayerCountException
Returns the invalid player count that triggered this exception.
getSymbol() - Method in enum class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Rank
Returns the short display symbol for this rank (e.g.

getTopCard() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TurnManager
 
getValue(int) - Method in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Card
Returns the effective value of this card given the current table sum.
